author: anon-ab6221f8
content: This is a larger refactor than originally scoped. The HashMap<String, Lock> is used in LocksFile which is serialized/deserialized to JSON on the hub branch. Changing to HashMap<i64, Lock> requires custom serde for backward compatibility with existing locks.json files that have string keys. Also need to update all sites that insert/remove from the map. Checking scope.
